戏鸯.appearance: 1girl, solo, long black hair, brown eyes, red dress, standing, indoor, traditional Chinese room, by table, {smile}, looking at viewer, upper body, hair ornament, pink flower, playful expression
戏鸯.desc: 石榴红长裙,黑色长发披肩,鬓边簪粉色绢花,瓜子脸,眉眼间带着俏皮笑意,身材玲珑有致,站在雅间内,手捧茶盅,烛光映照下肤色白皙

张拙.appearance: 1boy, solo, black hair, short hair, blue scholar robe, sitting, nervous expression, young man, indoor, traditional Chinese room, upper body
张拙.desc: 青衫书生打扮,短发,相貌憨厚,坐在圆凳上,背挺得笔直,双手规矩地放在膝盖上,脸上带着紧张的神情

云凫.appearance: 1girl, solo, long black hair, purple eyes, elegant, traditional Chinese dress, sitting, indoor, bedroom, by bed, gentle smile, mature woman, graceful posture
云凫.desc: 黑色长发披散，紫色眼眸深邃，身着素色襦裙，气质端庄优雅，坐在床边，神情温柔，成熟知性
